overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1216 layer, assign Release 1217, and load focused non-dam material consequences
Add recoverable rope commitment, sack cinching, temporary nest soaking, tool washing and rust consequences, and distinct boarded-surface tool experiments

preserved_canonical_state: Shadow Logic threat advancement remains first and authoritative for every turn
rope commitment is always recoverable through UNTIE and does not replace troll restraint
the brown sack remains the real sandwich bag and can be returned to canonical open use
wet nest state only delays ignition and never creates or removes the egg
canonical prepared and destructive nest-fire outcomes remain in GLULX-ALT-BURN-NEST
tool washing changes observation state but not weapon strength, dam operation, or scoring
board experiments preserve the inaccessible front entrance and reuse the existing painted splinter
excluded_scope: permanent destruction of the rope or canonical tools
Hidden Glade and character alternate ports
